emails.subject: Re: Enerfin meter 980439 for 10/00
emails.body: Daren can you please extend Deal #422516 to cover flow of 9 dec. for 10/6/2000 and extend deal 432556 to cover flow of 44 dec. for 10/19/2000? Volume Mgmt is trying to clear up these issues. Thanks -Jackie- Enron North America Corp. From: Victor Lamadrid 12/15/2000 11:52 AM
